chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-310 of 2020 C.P. No.D-311 of 2020 C.P. No.D-312 of 2020 C.P. No.D-313 of 2020 C.P. No.D-314 of 2020 C.P. No.D-315 of 2020 C.P. No.D-316 of 2020 C.P. No.D-317 of 2020 C.P. No.D-318 of 2020 C.P. No.D-319 of 2020 C.P. No.D-364 of 2020 C.P. No.D-401 of 2020 C.P. No.D-422 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.01.2021 M/s. Owais Ali Shah and Fayaz Ahmed Memon Advocates for the petitioners in CP No.D-310 to 318 of 2020. Mr. Riazat Ali Sahar Advocate for the petitioner in CP No.D-401 of 2020. Syed Muhammad Waseem Shah Advocate for the petitioners in CP No.D-319 of 2020. Mr. Mir Nawaz Kalhoro advocate for the petitioners in CP No.D-422 of 2020. None present for the petitioners in CP No.D-364 of 2020. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. A.G Sindh. === Learned counsel for the petitioners state that the impugned order passed by the respondents has been recalled vide order dated 01.01.2021 passed by Member (Reforms Wing and Special Cell) Board of Revenue Sindh. A statement along with a copy of the aforesaid order has been placed on record by them in support of the above contention. They seek withdrawal of these petitions on the ground that they have become infructuous. Accordingly, all these petitions and the applications pending therein, having served their purpose, stand dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs. JUDGE g JUDGE
